title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Aptech

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Aptech
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aptech. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!
